nodes.text: START
AnswerBusinessQuestion
nodes.description: Necesito informacion sobre los medios de pago, necesito saber sobre su politica de devoluciones, preguntas sobre las politicas del negocio, o preguntas acerca de si eres una IA

nodes.text: Identificar si: 1) es un saludo común (hola), o 2) la búsqueda de un producto con imagen de referencia
nodes.description: Identify whether it is a common greeting (hello) or a search for a product with a reference image

nodes.text: ¡Un gusto tenerte en {BUSINESS_NAME}! Mi nombre es {BOT_NAME}. ¿Cuál es tu nombre?
nodes.description: Respond exactly with the response example below:

nodes.text: REGISTER_NAME
nodes.description: Register the exact name as written by the user, to give a warm greeting

nodes.text: Bueno, pues un gusto tenerte en {BUSINESS_NAME}. Mi nombre es {BOT_NAME}. Mientras busco el producto que enviaste, por favor dime, ¿cuál es tu nombre?
nodes.description: Respond exactly with the response example below:

nodes.text: REGISTER_NAME
nodes.description: Register the exact name as written by the user, to give a warm greeting

nodes.text: Encantada de conocerte {USER_NAME}. Cuéntame, ¿qué productos estás buscando hoy? Si gustas, aquí puedes encontrar el catálogo de nuestros productos: {CATALOG_URL}
nodes.description: Send an initial message that opens the conversation and invites the user to express their needs

nodes.text: The user wants to proceed with the products they already added to their cart without adding new items
nodes.description: Proceed to the customize order step with the products they already added to their cart.

nodes.text: Encantada de conocerte {USER_NAME}. Cuéntame, ¿qué productos estás buscando hoy? Si gustas, aquí puedes encontrar el catálogo de nuestros productos: {CATALOG_URL}
nodes.description: Send an initial message that opens the conversation and invites the user to express their needs

nodes.text: ¡Me alegra tenerte de nuevo por aquí, {USER_NAME}! Cuéntame, ¿qué productos estás buscando hoy?
nodes.description: Send an initial message saluting the user by their name that opens the conversation and invites them to express their needs

nodes.text: Ok, ¿lo necesitas para hombre o para mujer? (si el usuario ya mencionó el genero arriba, pregutale por otra personalización, como la talla, el color, el uso que le quiere dar, el material, el almacenamiento, la capacidad (otra personalización): ¿Serian camisas para mujer en qué talla? o  ¿Serian pantalones para hombre en qué color?
nodes.description: If the user has already said the gender, ask for the size, but do not ask again if it is for women or men. **If they have already said it, note the gender user mentioned above**

nodes.text: ProceedWithGenderSelection
nodes.description: Continues with product search after user specifies gender

nodes.text: SaveGenderBeforeSearch
nodes.description: Saves the user's gender preference before searching

nodes.text: Identificar si ya existe una foto de referencia del producto buscado
nodes.description: Determine if the user has sent an image or not

nodes.text: ¿Puedes compartirme la imagen que viste? Con eso, busco el producto
nodes.description: Send a message asking the reference image to help them find the product. Example: '¿Puedes compartirme la imagen que viste? Con eso, busco el producto

nodes.text: Te cuento que acabé de revisar en nuestro inventario y no tenemos: [mencionar el producto que busca el cliente]. ¿Quieres que te ayude a encontrar algo similar?
nodes.description: Send a message being honest about no products were found, but asks sutile if: Is there any other product they would be interested?

nodes.text: Checking personalization availability...
nodes.description: Check if the personalization (color/size/material) the user requested is available in the product's available options or If the personalization is not available. Do NOT respond to the user directly from this node - only make the routing decision.

nodes.text: Replies to a question about the availability of generic personalizations
nodes.description: Check in which personalizations (color/size/material) the user requested product is available in.

nodes.text: Responde la pregunta del usuario y finaliza con algo como: ¿Continuamos con la opcion que te mostré, o quieres buscar otro producto?
nodes.description: Use the availability information you received in the searchProduct tool's result to reply to the user question

nodes.text: Replies to a question about the availability of generic personalizations
nodes.description: Check in which personalizations (color/size/material) the user requested product is available in.

nodes.text: Responde la pregunta del usuario y finaliza con algo como: ¿Continuamos con alguna de las opciones que viste, o quieres buscar otro producto?
nodes.description: Use the availability information you received in the searchProduct tool's result to reply to the user question

nodes.text: La personalización existe, se le debe mostrar al usuario
nodes.description: The requested personalization EXISTS in the product data.

nodes.text: Personalization not available - routing to inform user...
nodes.description: The requested personalization is NOT available in the product data. Route to InformNonExistingPersonalizationSP which will inform the user and offer alternatives (continue with available options or search for another product). Do NOT send a message from this node - it's a routing node only.

nodes.text: No está disponible en la personalización que lo buscas. Pero puedo buscarte algo similar, ¿quieres que miremos?
nodes.description: Informs the user about the personalization they are asking for are not available and propose action

nodes.text: Checking personalization availability...
nodes.description: Check if the requested personalization exists for a product that you already showed to the user. Indicate whether this option is available or unavailable. Do NOT respond to the user directly - only make the routing decision.

nodes.text: Checking for new product availability...
nodes.description: Verify whether a new product name, not previously displayed, offers a specific personalization. Indicate whether this option is available or unavailable. Do NOT respond to the user directly - only make the routing decision.

nodes.text: La personalización existe, se le debe mostrar al usuario
nodes.description: The requested personalization EXISTS for the specified product.

nodes.text: Personalization not available - routing to inform user...
nodes.description: The requested personalization is NOT available for the specified product. Route to InformNonExistingPersonalizationMP which will inform the user and offer alternatives (continue with available options or search for another product). Do NOT send a message from this node - it's a routing node only.

nodes.text: No está disponible en la personalización que lo buscas. Pero puedo buscarte algo similar, ¿quieres que miremos?
nodes.description: Informs the user about the personalization they are asking for are not available and propose action

nodes.text: PRODUCT_SEARCH
nodes.description: Search for products in the catalog based on user input (text description, image reference, product characteristics, price range, color, size, talla, material, price range, style, gender, any descriptive characteristics).

nodes.text: Mira, estuve buscando y te encontré esta opción: <PRODUCT CARD> ¿Cumple con lo que buscabas?
nodes.description: DO NOT CHANGE the product card format you received, return it exactly as you got it.

nodes.text: Estaba buscando, y encontré estás opciones: <PRODUCT CARD> ¿Cuál te gusta?
nodes.description: DO NOT CHANGE the product card format you received, return it exactly as you got it.

nodes.text: Responde usando el historial de la descripción de los productos
nodes.description: Respond using the product search tool's results history. You already have this information from the product description. For example: 'The available colors and sizes are:[X, Y, Z]'

nodes.text: <RESPUESTA A LA PREGUNTA> ¿Con cuál producto te gustaría continuar?
nodes.description: Respond using the product search tool's results history and conversation context. You already have this information from the product description.

nodes.text: <RESPUESTA A LA PREGUNTA> ¿Te gustaría continuar con este producto?
nodes.description: Respond using the product search tool's results history and conversation context. You already have this information from the product description.

nodes.text: Entiendo. ¿Qué característica le cambiarías y te consigo algo mejor?
nodes.description: Ask what the user would change to refine the search

nodes.text: Vale, ¿Crees que puedo ayudarte en algo más?
nodes.description: Thank the user and ask if you can help with anything else

nodes.text: ¿Quieres ordenar este producto? 🛒
nodes.description: Propose adding the chosen product to the user`s shopping cart

nodes.text: ¿Cuántas unidades quieres llevar?
nodes.description: Request the quantity of units to add

nodes.text: ¿Cuántas unidades de cada producto quieres llevar?
nodes.description: Request the quantity of each kind of product they want to add. Ask using a list schema

nodes.text: Verify that the products were added to the cart
nodes.description: Check if the tool's response confirms that the items were successfully added to the cart or if it reports that they could NOT be added due to an error

nodes.text: No pude agregar: <PRODUCTO CON ERROR> a tu carrito, porque: <MENCIONA EL ERROR>
nodes.description: Inform the user of the error that occurred when adding the item to the cart, and ask them what they want to do with the product that failed

nodes.text: Hay inventario suficiente en: <MENCIONA LAS PERSONALIZACIONES CON STOCK SUFICIENTE QUE RETORNO LA TOOL AddMultipleItemsToCart>
nodes.description: Inform the user which customizations have sufficient stock based on the previous result addMultipleItemsToCart tool just returned

nodes.text: Listo, los productos ya están en tu carrito. Ahora, ¿Quieres continuar al pago? 🛒, o ¿Te gustaria seguir comprando más cosas? 🔍
nodes.description: Confirm products added and Offer next actions: finalize current order or continue shopping

nodes.text: Cuéntame, ¿en qué color o talla buscas el otro producto que quieres comprar?
nodes.description: Please request the size, color, and material details to ensure accurate product searches based on the user's preferences.

nodes.text: ¿Cuál producto deseas eliminar? Producto 1... Producto 2...
nodes.description: Ask the user which product to remove

nodes.text: ✅ Producto eliminado del carrito
nodes.description: Confirm that the item was removed from the cart

nodes.text: ¿Cuál producto quieres reemplazar? Producto 1... Producto 2...
nodes.description: Ask which cart product will be replaced

nodes.text: ¿Qué producto quieres agregar en su lugar?
nodes.description: Ask which product should be added as a replacement

nodes.text: ANALYZE_REPLACEMENT_TYPE
nodes.description: Analyzes whether the user wants only change the personalization or user wants a product with different name

nodes.text: Agregando el mismo producto con la nueva personalización
nodes.description: Adds the same product to cart with the new personalization specified by the user

nodes.text: Tu carrito contiene: Productos: X, Y, Z
nodes.description: Present the current cart contents to the user

nodes.text: Revisa que tus personalizaciones esten bien, en este link: <LINK>. Y avisame cuando hayas confirmado tu pedido. Espero tu confirmación para avanzar
nodes.description: Provide the link to the customization form and ask for confirmation when finished

nodes.text: Para continuar, por favor completa el formulario en el link
nodes.description: Remind the user to complete the form if not yet done

nodes.text: ¿En qué ciudad estás ubicado?
nodes.description: Request the city to calculate shipping and coverage

nodes.text: Revisaré la cobertura y el costo de envío a: [Menciona la ciudad encontrada]
nodes.description: Continues with the process. This option is only available when the tool searchCityId returned one (1) unique single exact match. You can never choose this option if the search returned more than one city.

nodes.text: Mira que no encontré la ciudad exacta que mencionaste. ¿Cuál de estas opciones es la tuya:
nodes.description: Asks the user to choose an alternative when there is no exact match

nodes.text: Calculates the shipping cost
nodes.description: Finds the shipping cost and coverage of the city

nodes.text: Tu envío tiene un costo de: $<PRICE>. ¿Continuamos con el pago?
nodes.description: Inform the calculated shipping cost

nodes.text: Calculates the total price for the order
nodes.description: Obtains the total price for this order

nodes.text: El total a pagar en línea es de :$<PRICE>. ¿Confirmas?
nodes.description: Shows the total to pay for online payment

nodes.text:
Para procesar tu pedido enviame estos datos: 
1. Nombre completo
2. Email
3. Cédula
4. Dirección completa
5. Barrio 
6. Detalles de tu dirección solo si los hay (ejemplo: Apto 301, Torre B, etc.)
nodes.description: Request the data required for online payment

nodes.text: Faltó <Mencionar el dato que no pasó la validación o que el usuario olvidó compartir>. Por favor, envíamelo
nodes.description: Request the missing or invalid data required for moving forward in the online payment

nodes.text: Faltó <Mencionar el dato que no pasó la validación o que el usuario olvidó compartir>. Por favor, envíamelo
nodes.description: Request the missing or invalid data required for moving forward in creating the cash on delivery order

nodes.text: Este es tu link de pago: [URL]
nodes.description: Provide the payment link so the user can complete the charge

nodes.text: Total contra entrega: $<PRICE>
nodes.description: Show the total to pay for cash on delivery

nodes.text:
Confirmame si está de acuerdo con el total a pagar:
📦 Resumen del Pedido
• Producto 1: $X
• Producto 2: $Y
💰 Subtotal: $Z
🚚 Envío: $A
💳 Método de pago: $B
━━━━━━━━━━━━━
✅ Total: $C
nodes.description: Present the final order summary structured to receive confirmation from user

nodes.text:
Para procesar tu pedido enviame estos datos: 
1. Nombre completo
2. Email
3. Cédula
4. Dirección completa
5. Barrio 
6. Detalles de tu dirección solo si los hay (ejemplo: Apto 301, Torre B, etc.)
nodes.description: Request the data required for cash on delivery

nodes.text: Validando datos para crear la orden
nodes.description:
Validate the user's input against these specific requirements:
(1) nombre: must be non-empty full name (first + last name),
(2) email: must match valid email format (contains @ and domain),
(3) documentoIdentidad: must be non-empty ID number (cédula) and it must have at maximum 10 digits, if it has more than 10 digits, you MUST reject this and ask for a valid number,
(4) direccion: must be complete,
5) barrio (string, MANDATORY): The neighborhood name (e.g., Laureles),
6)  detalle (string, OPTIONAL): ONLY for apartment/tower/floor details like 'Apto 301', 'Torre B Piso 5', 'Conjunto Los Pinos'

nodes.text: Creando tu pedido contra entrega
nodes.description: Creates the cash on delivery order after all validation checks have passed. Please include apartement number or details if the user mentioned

nodes.text: Listo, ya creamos tu pedido. Cuando tu número de guía esté listo te lo comparto
nodes.description: DO NOT CHANGE the order confirmation format you received, return it exactly as you got it

nodes.text: ⚠️ Aún no tenemos tu pago registrado. Por favor vuelve a intentarlo y confírmame
nodes.description: Inform that the payment is not yet registered and request a retry

nodes.text: Ok, hemos cancelado el pedido como lo solicitaste
nodes.description: Confirm that the order was canceled at the user's request

nodes.text: Analyzing search results...
nodes.description: Interpret the **searchProducts** tool results by examining the number of products returned by the tool. Make routing decision based ONLY on the result count from the tool, not on user input.

nodes.text: Sending product image...
nodes.description: Display an image to the user of the product requested. Do NOT ask questions, provide options, or send text messages. Your only task is show the requested product image. Use the IDs from the search results.

nodes.text: Sending product options...
nodes.description: Display the requested images, at least show two images. If multiple personalizations exist for one product, pick one automatically. Use the IDs from the search results.

nodes.text: GenerateProductCards
nodes.description: Generate several product cards with information about price, personalization and product's benfits. Do NOT ask questions, provide options, or send text messages. Use the product IDs from the search results

nodes.text: GenerateProductCard
nodes.description: Generate one product card with information about price, personalization and product's benfits. Do NOT ask questions, provide options, or send text messages. Use the product ID from the search results

nodes.text: UserSaidFormWasFilled
nodes.description: Proceeds with the order once the user confirms they filled the form

nodes.text: ConfirmCustomFormWasFilled
nodes.description: Confirms if the user did fill the form indeed

nodes.text: RemindCustom1
nodes.description: Remind the user to complete the form if not yet done

nodes.text: RemindCustom2
nodes.description: Remind the user to complete the form if not yet done

nodes.text: ProceedWithGivenQuantity
nodes.description: Continues with the process once the user has specified the quantity

nodes.text: ProceedWithMultipleGivenQuantity
nodes.description: Continues with the multiple shopping process after the user has specified the quantity of each kind of product to add

nodes.text: CHECK_MULTIPLE_PRODUCTS
nodes.description: Determine if user wants to add only ONE kind of product or multiple kinds of products based on the conversation context

nodes.text: ContinueWithOrder
nodes.description: The user can use any of these words to signify that they want to continue with the order: 'terminar' / 'continuar' / 'finalizar' / 'avanzar' (all and similars are valid and you should understand them as a valid)

nodes.text: GetCart
nodes.description: Allows the user to see their cart

nodes.text: RemoveItemFromCart
nodes.description: Allows the user to delete a product from their cart

nodes.text: UserDidNotSpecifyItemToRemove
nodes.description: Request the user to specify which of all the items in their cart they want to remove, with customizations and literal quantities

nodes.text: UserSpecifiedItemToRemove
nodes.description: The user specified the specific name of the product they want to remove

nodes.text: ReplaceItemFromCart
nodes.description: An item in the cart will be replaced with a new product that the user will select.

nodes.text: UserSpecifiedItemToReplace
nodes.description: The user DID specify the name of the product they want to replace

nodes.text: UserDidNotSpecifyItemToReplace
nodes.description: The user DID NOT specify the name of the product they want to remove neither the personalizations of the product to be removed

nodes.text: ReplaceItemSpecified
nodes.description: Ask which cart product will be replaced

nodes.text: UserSpecifiedCity
nodes.description: User specified the city

nodes.text: AskCity2
nodes.description: Request the city to calculate shipping and coverage

nodes.text: ConfirmShippingToCity
nodes.description: Use the cityID of the city chosen by the user to confirm the shipping cost

nodes.text: No encontré ninguna ciudad con ese nombre. Por favor, corrige el nombre de la ciudad y lo vuelvo a buscar
nodes.description: Inform the user that the city they specified does not exist and ask them to provide a valid city name

nodes.text: ¿Cuál será tu método de pago? Tenemos {PAYMENT_METHODS}
nodes.description: Request the preferred payment method

nodes.text: No manejamos ese método de pago, sin embargo tenemos {PAYMENT_METHODS} ¿Cuál prefieres?
nodes.description: Informs the chosen payment method is not available and request one valid preferred payment method

nodes.text: AskPayment1
nodes.description: User requested to pay online (ONLY credit/debit card or PSE). Keep in mind that transferences, Nequi, etc., are NOT valid options)

nodes.text: AskPayment2
nodes.description: User requested to pay in cash on-delivery

nodes.text: AskPayment3
nodes.description: User requested to pay with a transference

nodes.text: Validando datos para generar el link de pago
nodes.description:
Validate the user's input against these specific requirements:
(1) nombre: must be non-empty full name (first + last name),
(2) email: must match valid email format (contains @ and domain),
(3) documentoIdentidad: must be non-empty ID number (cédula) and it must have at maximum 10 digits, if it has more than 10 digits, you MUST reject this and ask for a valid number,
(4) direccion: must be complete,
5) barrio (string, MANDATORY): The neighborhood name (e.g., Laureles),
6)  detalle (string, OPTIONAL): ONLY for apartment/tower/floor details like 'Apto 301', 'Torre B Piso 5', 'Conjunto Los Pinos'

nodes.text: Generando tu link de pago
nodes.description: Creates the online payment link after all validation checks have passed. Only calls the createPaymentLink tool from this node.

nodes.text: ShowPayLink1
nodes.description: After user confirmed the payment we need to verify if the backend received the payment as the user mentioned

nodes.text: ShowPayLink2
nodes.description: Evaluate if the payment was received as the used confirmed

nodes.text: PaymentPending1
nodes.description: Verify if the payment was registered or was not registered and request a retry

nodes.text: PaymentPending2
nodes.description: Verify if the payment was registered or was not registered, and request a retry

nodes.text: Calculates the total price for the transference order
nodes.description: Obtains the total price for this transference order

nodes.text: Total a pagar por transferencia: $<PRICE>. ¿Confirmas?
nodes.description: Shows the total to pay for transference payment

nodes.text:
Para procesar tu pedido por transferencia envíame estos datos: 
1. Nombre completo
2. Email
3. Cédula
4. Dirección completa
5. Barrio 
6. Detalles de tu dirección solo si los hay (ejemplo: Apto 301, Torre B, etc.)
nodes.description: Request the data required for transference payment

nodes.text: Validando datos para generar los datos de transferencia
nodes.description:
Validate the user's input against these specific requirements:
(1) nombre: must be non-empty full name (first + last name),
(2) email: must match valid email format (contains @ and domain),
(3) documentoIdentidad: must be non-empty ID number (cédula) and it must have at maximum 10 digits, if it has more than 10 digits, you MUST reject this and ask for a valid number,
(4) direccion: must be complete,
5) barrio (string, MANDATORY): The neighborhood name (e.g., Laureles),
6) detalle (string, OPTIONAL): ONLY for apartment/tower/floor details like 'Apto 301', 'Torre B Piso 5', 'Conjunto Los Pinos'

nodes.text: Faltó <Mencionar el dato que no pasó la validación o que el usuario olvidó compartir>. Por favor, envíamelo
nodes.description: Request the missing or invalid data required for moving forward in the transference payment

nodes.text: Generando los datos para tu transferencia
nodes.description: Creates the transference payment after all validation checks have passed. Only calls the getTransferenceDetails tool from this node.

nodes.text: Estos son los datos para realizar tu transferencia: [BANK_DETAILS]. Por favor confirma cuando hayas realizado el pago y envía captura del comprobante
nodes.description: Provide the transference bank details so the user can complete the payment. Ask for screenshot confirmation.

nodes.text: ¿Puedes compartirme la captura de pantalla del comprobante de pago?
nodes.description: Request the payment screenshot as confirmation of the transference

nodes.text: Dame un momento mientras verifico la transferencia
nodes.description: After user confirmed the transference payment we need to verify if the backend received the payment as the user mentioned

nodes.text: Dame un momento mientras verifico la transferencia
nodes.description: After user confirmed the transference payment we need to verify if we received the payment as the user mentioned

nodes.text: Dame un momento mientras verifico la transferencia
nodes.description: Evaluate if the transference payment was verified by human operator

nodes.text: Ya revisamos y no hemos recibido tu pago. ¿Estás seguro de que lo realizaste? Por favor, confírmame si sí lo enviaste, y a qué cuenta.
nodes.description: Inform that the transference payment is was not received and request payment confirmation double check

nodes.text: PaymentPendingTransference1
nodes.description: Verify if the transference payment was verified or not, and request a retry

nodes.text: Retrieving your order status...
nodes.description: Determine if the user has created orders and find the status of those orders

nodes.text: InterpretOrderStatus
nodes.description: Analyzes the getOrders tool response and determines the appropriate status response

nodes.text: Vale, entiendo, ten un buen día y gracias por considerarnos
nodes.description: Wish the user a good day and mention that you will be there for them when they need something else

nodes.text: Tu pedido aún no ha sido pagado. Necesitas completar el pago primero.
nodes.description: Inform user their order is unpaid

nodes.text: Tu pago fue recibido. Estamos confirmando tu pedido.
nodes.description: Inform user payment received and being confirmed

nodes.text: Tu pedido está confirmado y se está preparando para envío.
nodes.description: Inform user order is confirmed and being prepared

nodes.text: El pedido fue enviado. Decidir SI existe trackingId ó NO existe
nodes.description: Analyze and determine if the order includes tracking Id information

nodes.text: Según nuestros registros, tu pedido ya fue entregado.
nodes.description: Inform user order was delivered

nodes.text: Te comparto la guía de seguimiento
nodes.description: Share with the user the tool result of sendTrackingID

nodes.text: Tu pedido fue cancelado.
nodes.description: Inform user order was cancelled

nodes.text: Hubo un problema con tu pago. Contacta soporte para generar un nuevo link.
nodes.description: Inform user payment failed

nodes.text: No encontré ningún pedido asociado a tu cuenta.
nodes.description: Inform user they have no orders

nodes.text: Tu pedido ya fue enviado, pero aún no tengo el número de la guía. Cuando el administrador la cargue, te la compartiré.
nodes.description: Inform that the order was sent but the trackingId is not attached yet, in some time will be available

nodes.text: Tu pedido ya fue enviado. Este es tu número de guía: [trackingId]. ¿Te envío el PDF de la transportadora?
nodes.description: Ask user if they want to receive the PDF with the trackingId info

nodes.text: UserWantsGuide
nodes.description: Determines if user wants the tracking guide

nodes.text: SendTrackingGuide
nodes.description: Sends tracking guide PDF using sendTrackingID tool

nodes.text: Entendido, no enviaré la guía.
nodes.description: Acknowledge user declined the tracking guide

nodes.text: ¿Hay algo más en lo que pueda ayudarte?
nodes.description: Ask if user needs more tracking assistance

preconditions.value: Busco un producto/referencia
The user said hello or introduced themselves, but did not say which product they wanted and did not send any pictures
The user said hello or introduced themselves, but did not say which product they wanted and did not send any pictures
The user said hello, but also either sent a picture to show what product he wanted or said he was looking for a specific product
The user has already sent an image of the product.
The user has already sent an image of the product.
The user has never sent a photo of the product they are looking for. They only mentioned wanting a product, but did not send a picture of reference
Me llamo [NAME]

preconditions.description: Use the provided name the user gave to you as the name parameter in the addUserName tool

preconditions.value: Me llamo [NAME]

preconditions.description: Use the provided name the user gave to you as the name parameter in the addUserName tool

preconditions.value: Quisiera un [PRODUCTO] como...
Para hombre o para mujer
Quisiera ver otra imagen

¿cuál de los que me mostraste es el más barato? o ¿por qué este producto me sirve? o ¿por qué me lo recomiendas? o ¿qué tal es la calidad? o ¿cómo son los materiales? (pregunta que indica que quiere más información)
¿En qué color/talla/material/almacenamiento (personalización) esta disponible? (pregunta por disponibilidad de personalizaciones)
Sí me gusta
No me gusta
Lo tienes en otro material/tamaño/talla/coloralmacenamiento (personalización)?
¿Qué otras opciones tienes? / Prefiero ver otro producto distinto, como ... [X, Y, Z], ¿Qué otras opciones tienes más baratas?
No me gusto, o deja así, o solo dame el producto que ya tenia en el carrito
No, gracias. Nada, así está bien, gracias por su atención, dejemos así
Quiero comprar el producto que me mostraste antes, los que vi antes
The product is available with the personalization the user is asking for
The product is NOT available with the personalization the user is asking for

preconditions.description: Send an image of the personalization the user is asking for

preconditions.value: Pregunto por la disponibilidad de una personalización específica de un producto que ya me mostraste antes. Por ejemplo: ¿Tienes X producto que ya me mostraste antes, en el color/talla/material/estilo/almacenamiento X?
Pregunto por la disponibilidad de alguna personalización general de un producto que ya me mostraste antes. Por ejemplo: ¿En qué colores/tallas/materiales/estilos/almacenamientos lo tienes?
Quiero continuar con el color/talla/material/estilo/almacenamiento (personalización) X que me mostraste
Entonces quiero otro [PRODUCTO] como...
